title: ADR-0001 implementation does NOT persist across workspace resets — verify the tree, not memory
content: Recurring pattern for local-seo-agency: ADR-0001 (test harness + pure-logic coverage) gets re-seeded to UNIMPLEMENTED state between runs even after a prior run records it as IMPLEMENTED & green. On 2026-05-27 a third run found NO test script, NO tsx devDep, NO src/features/rankings/rank.ts, and zero *.test.ts — despite memory claiming full implementation. ALWAYS verify package.json scripts + file existence against the actual tree before trusting the IMPLEMENTED memory; re-implement from the ADR if absent. The implementation recipe that works: install tsx@^4.22.3, add `test`: `node --import tsx --test "src/**/*.test.ts"`, create rank.ts (rankDelta+formatRankDelta, non-finite-guarded), refactor KeywordTable.tsx, write format.test.ts + rank.test.ts. Result = 28 pass / 0 fail, ~263ms, Node v24.12.0, tsc clean. Two gotchas: (1) format.ts formatSignedCurrency uses U+2212 minus not ASCII; (2) test imports MUST be extensionless (./format not ./format.ts) or strict tsc errors TS5097.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 13:55 UTC
ADR-0001 re-committed as 199409b on dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness (2026-05-27, 4th run)
content: CONFIRMED RECURRING PATTERN for local-seo-agency: the workspace resets between runs and prior dev-clone branches vanish. On this run (4th) the tree was back on `main` with ADR-0001 work UNCOMMITTED (rank.ts/rank.test.ts/format.test.ts untracked, KeywordTable.tsx + package.json modified) — the previously-recorded branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness (commit a045f2c) no longer existed. The code itself was intact and correct: re-verified 28/28 tests green (~209ms, Node v24), tsc --noEmit clean, rank-drop fix present. Re-branched dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness and committed 7 paths as NEW commit 199409b. LESSON: always git rev-parse HEAD + git status first; the branch/commit hash from memory will likely be stale. Test count is now 28 (was 27 in an earlier run — format.test.ts grew). Recipe unchanged: tsx@^4.22.3, test script 'node --import tsx --test', rank.ts guarded, KeywordTable refactored, format NaN pinned not guarded.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 13:58 UTC
Resolved/open code-review findings — ADR-0001 (local-seo-agency) — UPDATED 2026-05-27 (commit 199409b)
content: Re-review of ADR-0001 after workspace reset + re-commit. Branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness now at NEW commit 199409b (prior a045f2c gone — workspace resets between runs, confirmed pattern). Code is byte-identical to the previously-APPROVED state. Verdict: APPROVE. [cr-f1] HIGH rank-drop hidden — RESOLVED + intact: rankDelta() in src/features/rankings/rank.ts handles up/down/flat, drops render '↓ N' in text-danger via deltaToneClass.down, non-finite guarded to flat/0; covered by rank.test.ts. 28/28 green (~214ms, re-run independently), tsc --noEmit exit 0. [cr-f2] MED formatPercent NaN→'NaN%' — STILL OPEN, pre-existing, zero call sites, intentionally PINNED in format.test.ts. [cr-f3] MED formatSignedCurrency NaN→'$NaN' — STILL OPEN, pinned. [cr-f4] LOW format.ts ASCII '+' vs U+2212 '−' — STILL OPEN, pinned. format.ts UNTOUCHED by this changeset → f2/f3/f4 do not gate; follow-up backlog (add Number.isFinite guard before live-data wiring). Test count grew 27→28 (format.test.ts). LESSON: re-verify commit hash from git, never trust the hash in handoff/memory — it goes stale on reset.

STATUS: [sec-m1] MEDIUM postcss <8.5.10 GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 transitive XSS — STILL OPEN, package.json STILL has NO overrides block (verified); fix unchanged = overrides {next:{postcss:'>=8.5.10'}}. NEW FILE src/app/landing-claude/page.tsx scanned CLEAN (internal links only, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML/fetch/secrets). @google/generative-ai@^0.24.1 STILL zero call sites in src/ — watch item for API-key handling + prompt-injection when wired. Still no API routes. Secrets clean, no eval/exec/process.env/NEXT_PUBLIC_ leak. title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 14:02 UTC
Version decision — local-seo-agency v0.2.3 (PATCH; post-reset tag reconciliation)
content: Released v0.2.3 on 2026-05-27, bump 0.2.0->0.2.3 PATCH (commit 218a0ca, annotated tag v0.2.3, branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness, NOT pushed). CONTEXT: third workspace reset. HEAD (199409b) carried package.json 0.2.0 and CHANGELOG topped at [0.2.0]; my prior releases v0.2.1(2edefbd, docs) and v0.2.2(f574c04, rank fix) were squashed/consolidated into the single commit 199409b, BUT their tags still exist pointing to now-ORPHANED unreachable commits. RULE APPLIED: never reuse/overwrite a tag -> incremented PAST the burned 0.2.1/0.2.2 numbers to 0.2.3 (tag-conflict => increment-patch rule). Change set since v0.2.0 = user-facing FIX (KeywordTable rank drops now render '↓ N' in text-danger instead of being hidden as '—') + pure non-finite-safe rank.ts + node --test harness/tsx devDep + ADR-0001/backlog/moonshots docs + README refresh => PATCH (non-breaking, no new runtime feature) per repo 0.x convention and standard semver. LESSON: after a workspace reset, ALWAYS check `git tag --merged HEAD` vs all tags — orphaned tags from prior runs burn version numbers; resolve the next free patch rather than colliding. Flagged orphaned-tag cleanup for review.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 14:05 UTC
v0.2.3 = post-reset reconciliation of 0.2.1+0.2.2; no new behavior
content: local-seo-agency v0.2.3 (release commit 218a0ca, feature commit 199409b) is a versioning-reconciliation release, NOT new feature work. A workspace reset orphaned the v0.2.1/v0.2.2 tags on detached commits, so 218a0ca re-applies and consolidates the docs-only 0.2.1 work plus the 0.2.2 functional work (rank-drop fix rendering '↓ N' in text-danger, pure rank.ts, node --test harness + tsx, KeywordTable refactor) into a single fresh CHANGELOG [0.2.3] entry and bumps past the burned tags. The functional change set is identical to what v0.2.2 already shipped — no NEW user-facing behavior. CHANGELOG was pre-authored by the Release Manager (verify-not-author). README was left UNCHANGED because the only candidate edits (npm test in Scripts table, rank.ts in structure tree) are the exact edits the human REJECTED for v0.2.2 as 'out of scope; defer' — honored that standing decision. Lesson: when a 'new' release just reconciles already-documented work, treat the human's prior deferral on the same edits as still binding; don't re-propose rejected changes.
